statuses.dod-complete: Skill has review evidence and deterministic DoD materials.
statuses.reviewed: Skill has been reviewed or improved but may not have deterministic scripts.
statuses.pending: Skill is not yet certified in the ledger.

risk_rules.condition: skills directory contains slugs that are absent from docs/audits/skill-review-ledger.csv
docs/audits/skills/<slug>-review.md exists while ledger status is pending or absent
skills/<slug>/scripts/check.sh exists while ledger status is pending or absent
adapter or PRISTINO generated files are dirty before creating a PR
